title: Coordination Index
summary: Active initiatives exist and the coordination surface points to the most actionable next work.
recommended_next_action: Start or continue the active task set and keep the current task records aligned with execution progress.

entries.title: Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing PRD
entries.summary: Harden under-covered executable test surfaces, rebalance the unit suite structure, and tighten unit-suite documentation so WatchTowerPlan has a more reliable and maintainable test foundation before WatchTower product implementation begins.
entries.next_action: Start or continue the active task set and keep the current task records aligned with execution progress.

active_task_summaries.title: Harden GitHub integration and sync coverage
Expand orchestration and derivation failure coverage
Rebalance unit suite structure and docs

entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the unit-test hardening and rebalancing initiative.

entries.title: Workflow System Operationalization PRD
entries.summary: Defines the follow-up work needed to make workflow routing, planning scaffolding, and task lifecycle handling executable, machine-readable, and easier to use before WatchTower implementation begins.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Operationalized route preview, workflow metadata, planning scaffolds, task lifecycle commands, and reconciliation guidance.
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the workflow system operationalization initiative.

entries.title: End-to-End Repository Review and Rationalization PRD
entries.summary: Defines the final pre-implementation review follow-up needed to harden documentation guardrails, derived coordination metadata, external pack validation seams, and CLI modularity before WatchTower product implementation begins.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated final pre-implementation repository rationalization.
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the end-to-end repository review and rationalization initiative.

entries.title: Machine-First Coordination Surface PRD
entries.summary: Defines the work needed to publish one always-useful machine coordination surface, keep human planning entrypoints derived from it, and reduce planning-navigation sprawl before product implementation starts.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated machine-first coordination surfaces.
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the machine-first coordination surface initiative.

entries.title: Pre-Implementation Repository Review and Hardening PRD
entries.summary: Defines the review-driven work needed to streamline planning coordination, shrink low-value documentation entrypoints, and harden watchtower_core for future configurable external pack use before product implementation begins.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated pre-implementation repository review and hardening.
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the pre-implementation repository review and hardening initiative.

entries.title: Core Export Hardening Follow-Up PRD
entries.summary: Defines the follow-up work needed to make export-oriented sync snapshots dependency-correct, repair command implementation metadata, and harden the public boundary around repo-specific services.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Implemented and validated export hardening follow-up.
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the post-review export hardening initiative. All three bounded implementation slices are complete and validated.

entries.title: Template and Output Efficiency PRD
entries.summary: Defines the work needed to make repository templates and generated human-readable outputs compact, reviewable, and still machine-usable without low-value boilerplate.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Implemented and validated template and output efficiency improvements.
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence for the template and output efficiency initiative.

entries.title: Core Export Readiness and Optimization PRD
entries.summary: Defines the product and engineering requirements for making WatchTowerPlan core export-ready, lower-fan-out to maintain, and prepared to publish generic pack-facing contracts for future WatchTower work.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated; future WatchTower pack implementation belongs to a new bounded initiative
entries.notes: Planning-baseline evidence updated after all planned export-readiness slices landed. The initiative now has the reusable boundary refactor, registry-driven orchestration, retrieval metadata, and generic pack-facing interfaces in place and validated.

entries.title: Initiative Closeout and Planning Trackers
entries.summary: Defines the first initiative closeout model, its traceability fields, and the generated planning trackers that mirror initiative outcome for humans.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated; future planning-closeout expansion belongs to a new bounded initiative

entries.title: GitHub Collaboration Scaffolding
entries.summary: Defines the hosted GitHub intake, pull request, and project-field scaffolding that complements the repo-local planning and task model.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated; future GitHub-hosted collaboration work belongs to a new bounded initiative

entries.title: Core Python Foundation PRD
entries.summary: Defines the planning intent for the core Python workspace, control-plane loaders, validation, and query foundations.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated; future core export and product work belong to a new bounded initiative
entries.notes: First executable slice for the core Python helper and harness layer.

entries.title: Command Documentation and Lookup Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for a human-readable command-page family under docs/commands and a machine-readable command index under core/control_plane/indexes/commands.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated; future command-surface expansion belongs to a new bounded initiative

entries.title: Acceptance and Evidence Reconciliation Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for the acceptance and evidence reconciliation flow that keeps acceptance contracts, validator expectations, validation evidence, and traceability joins aligned.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated; future expansion belongs to a new bounded initiative

entries.title: GitHub Task Push Sync
entries.summary: Defines the first push-only sync from local task records to GitHub issues and optional project items while preserving local task authority.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
